abstract: Transformation represents a core dimension of the human spiritual experience and serves as a foundational pillar within the academic study of Christian Spirituality. At its heart, transformation involves the profound and enduring shifts that occur within individuals as they encounter the Divine, maturing in both their lived experience of faith and the outward expression of their beliefs. This article situates this transformative dynamic within the specific framework of Biblical Spirituality, beginning with a concise overview of the discipline. After exploring the conceptual nuances of transformation in detail, the discussion examines its inherent relationship with and manifestation throughout the biblical text.
